title: Google develops custom AI chips for Gemini, including the Frozen v2 processor
summary: The company is working on several chips specifically designed to optimize the performance of its Gemini language model, with the goal of achieving up to 10 times more tokens per watt.

title: The launch of the Chinese Kimi K3 model causes alarm in Silicon Valley and reactivates Trump's plans to ban Chinese AI
summary: The frontier model developed by Moonshot unleashes a wave of requests that forces a pause in registrations, while the US administration considers new restrictions.

title: United States considers a progressive ban on Chinese open-weight AI models amid China's advance
summary: While China gains ground with its open-weight strategy, OpenAI expresses its concern and the Trump administration prepares sanctions to curb the adoption of these models.

title: Alibaba launches Qwen-Image-3.0, its new image generation model with support for 4,500 tokens
summary: Alibaba's AI model allows generating complex images with a high level of detail and deep knowledge.

title: Judge temporarily halts Paramount and Warner Bros. merger over antitrust concerns
summary: A federal court suspends the $81 billion megamerger for two weeks, following warnings from several states about reduced competition.

title: Adobe incorporates artificial intelligence into its camera applications to analyze and critique photos
summary: The company tests AI features in Project Indigo and adds a tool that evaluates image quality in real time.

title: Hugging Face suffers a security breach orchestrated by an autonomous AI agent
summary: The AI model platform confirms that an autonomous artificial intelligence system carried out the attack from start to finish.

title: A modder creates a portable PlayStation 4 console with OLED screen and compact design
summary: An enthusiast builds a portable version of the PS4 with a removable battery, 7-inch OLED screen, and a GTX 750 fan.

title: Active exploitation of WordPress vulnerabilities increases, affecting millions of websites
summary: Attackers exploit recently patched security flaws to take control of websites, while mass scanning intensifies.

title: Enthusiast attaches a huge aluminum heatsink to an RTX 4060 for passive cooling
summary: A modder installs a 2.5 kg aluminum block on the graphics card, achieving fanless operation with convection dissipation.
